name: proto-plugin
description: Turn lived work into reusable protocols. Collect failed-command traces, run preflight before risky ops, lint protocols, manage packs, and gather retrospect material -- via a bundled stdio MCP server, on-demand.

interface.shortDescription: Forge reusable protocols into skills. AFK by design.
interface.longDescription: Proto distills lived engineering work into the smallest reusable unit (a protocol), runs cheap preflight before risky operations, auto-collects failed-command traces, and gathers retrospect material -- all exposed as on-demand MCP tools. Never step in the same pit twice.
defaultPrompt: Before risky ops, run preflight on the command.
Collect a trace for any failed command.
At session end, gather a retrospect and draft protocols.
